primary.title: Age Calculator - Calculate Exact Age Online
primary.description: Calculate your exact age in years, months, and days. Track how many days you have lived, estimated heartbeats, sleeping time, and equivalent dog years.
primary.heading: Age Calculator
primary.seo_content:
Our Age Calculator provides a precise breakdown of your age and life metrics. Here is what this tool computes:

  • 1. Exact Calendar Age

    Calculates exact years, months, and days since your birth, automatically adjusting for leap years.
    Example: Born June 15, 1995. On June 20, 2026, exact age is 31 Years, 0 Months, 5 Days.

  • 2. Next Birthday Countdown

    Computes how many months and days remain until your next birthday, and shows what day of the week it will fall on.

  • 3. Life Telemetry Statistics

    Converts your total lifespan into cumulative months, weeks, days, hours, and minutes, alongside equivalent dog years.

examples.title: Determining exact milestone ages
examples.description: If someone was born on June 15, 1995, entering their birthdate reveals exactly how many years, months, and days they have lived down to the current date.

examples.title: Dog years equivalence check
examples.description: See how old you would be in dog years (usually calculated as human years multiplied by 7).

faqs.question: How are dog years calculated?
faqs.answer: Typically, dog years are calculated by multiplying human years by 7. However, the actual aging rate of dogs depends on their breed size and developmental stages.

faqs.question: Is my birthdate data saved on your servers?
faqs.answer: No, all calculations are performed locally in your web browser using client-side JavaScript. We never collect or store your date of birth.

birthday-calculator.title: Birthday Calculator - Next Birthday Countdown
birthday-calculator.description: Determine exactly when your next birthday is, what day of the week it falls on, and track a detailed countdown timer.
birthday-calculator.heading: Birthday Calculator
birthday-calculator.seo_content:
A birthday calculator helps you count down the time until your next annual celebration. Here is how it helps you plan:

  • Countdown Tracker

    Tells you exactly how many months, days, hours, and minutes are remaining before you turn a year older.
    Example: Input your birthday and instantly know if you have 5 months and 12 days left.

  • Weekday Matcher

    Shows what day of the week your birthday falls on this year and next year to help organize weekend parties.

examples.title: Countdown check for upcoming birthdays
examples.description: Input your birthday to find the exact days left and prepare your calendar arrangements.

faqs.question: Why does the weekday of my birthday change every year?
faqs.answer: Because a standard year has 365 days, which is 52 weeks and 1 day, your birthday usually shifts forward by one day of the week each year (or two days in leap years).

how-old-am-i.title: How Old Am I Calculator - Exact Age Finder
how-old-am-i.description: Calculate your exact age in years, months, weeks, days, and seconds. Instant, private, and free client-side tool.
how-old-am-i.heading: How Old Am I?
how-old-am-i.seo_content:
If you've ever asked yourself 'How old am I exactly?', this calculator provides the breakdown. It details:

  • Lifespan Conversion Metrics

    Translates your exact age into months, weeks, days, hours, minutes, and seconds.
    Example: A 25-year-old has lived exactly 300 months or over 9,130 days.

examples.title: Checking exact years, months, and days
examples.description: A quick input of any birthday instantly splits the duration into clean readable intervals.

faqs.question: How does this tool handle leap years?
faqs.answer: The browser JavaScript Date object handles varying month sizes (28, 29, 30, or 31 days) automatically relative to historical leap years.
